zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk de Orreby於1230年1月8日出生在英國爾哈黑頓時，他的父親Philip de Orreby I70歲，母親Alicia de Bamville45歲。他於1250年與Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國被列為chief justice。他去世於1261年8月23日在他的家鄉享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk de Orreby于1230年1月8日出生在英国爾哈黑頓时，他的父亲Philip de Orreby I70岁，母亲Alicia de Bamville45岁。他于1250年与Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国被列为chief justice。他去世于1261年8月23日在他的家乡享年31岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

meanings: English: variant of   Orrey  ;  see  Urry  .

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk de Orreby was born on 8 January 1230, in Hatherton, Cheshire, England, his father, Philip de Orreby I, was 70 and his mother, Alicia de Bamville, was 45. He married Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby in 1250, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as chief justice in England. He died on 23 August 1261, in his hometown, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk de Orreby est né le 8 janvier 1230, à Hatherton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip de Orreby I, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Alicia de Bamville, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby en 1250, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est chief justice à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 23 août 1261, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk de Orreby am 8. Januar 1230 in Hatherton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip de Orreby I 70 und seine Mutter Alicia de Bamville 45. Er hat 1250 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als chief justice in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. August 1261 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk de Orreby è nato il il 8 gennaio 1230 nel Hatherton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Philip de Orreby I, aveva 70 anni e il suo madre, Alicia de Bamville, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby nel 1250, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come chief justice nel England. Morì il 23 agosto 1261, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk de Orrebyが1230年1月8日にイギリスチェシュアイアハスエルトンで生まれた時，父Philip de Orreby Iは70歳，母Alicia de Bamvilleは45歳であった。1250年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでPhilippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスでの職業はchief justiceと記録されている。彼は1261年8月23日に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk de Orreby(이)가 1230년 1월 8일 영국 체실르 하더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip de Orreby I(은)는 70세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia de Bamville(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국에서 chief justice이었다. 그는 1261년 8월 23일 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk de Orreby nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1230, em Hatherton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip de Orreby I, tinha 70 anos e sua mãe, Alicia de Bamville, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby em 1250, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como chief justice em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1261, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk de Orreby родился 8 января 1230 г. в местности хатиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip de Orreby I было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia de Bamville, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby в 1250 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии chief justice в местности Англия. Он умер 23 августа 1261 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год.
